description: An always-current view of where a client's active project stands — phase, this week's focus, blockers, upcoming deliverables. Update the content blocks weekly.

blocks.textHTML:
Project status

This page reflects where your project stands as of this week. We update it after every Friday check-in so you always have a current picture without waiting for an email.

Where we are

Current phase: Discovery / Design / Development / QA / Launch (update this each week)

Overall progress: XX%

Next milestone: [milestone name] — expected [date]

This week's focus

  • [Top priority for this week]
  • [Second priority]
  • [Anything we need from you]

Blockers / decisions needed

Anything currently waiting on a decision from your side, listed here so it doesn't sit in someone's inbox. If this section is empty, you're all clear.

Recent deliverables

Links to most recent shared work — designs, drafts, demo URLs. We'll keep the last 3-4 here for quick reference.
